metadata.description: Umbrella plugin for delegating coding/research tasks from Claude Code to external AI coding-agent CLIs (Codex, Gemini, Qwen, OpenClaude, OpenCode) and to Claude subagents. Ported from the Nous Research hermes-agent autonomous-ai-agents skill.

plugins.name: delegate-to-agents
plugins.description: Delegate tasks from Claude Code to external coding-agent CLIs and Claude subagents, with parallel and reconciliation patterns.
